description_long: This is a modern laptop with a sleek, angular design and a matte gray chassis. The keyboard area features vibrant, multicolored backlit lines running horizontally across the keys, giving it a distinctive and futuristic appearance. The touchpad is positioned slightly left of center, and the palm rest area displays two colorful graphic icons on the right side. The screen is open and displays a monochrome portrait graphic with a signature, set against a black background. The laptop's overall build appears to be primarily metal with some plastic elements, and the hinge is robust and minimalistic. No visible ports are present on the sides in the provided views.
description: A sleek, gray laptop with a multicolored backlit keyboard, a unique portrait graphic on the screen, and colorful icons on the palm rest.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open screen with a portrait graphic, full keyboard with multicolored backlighting, and colorful icons on the right palm rest.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the thin profile, open screen with visible portrait graphic, and the colorful keyboard.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the screen and the laptop's hinge, with no visible ports or features.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the open screen, colorful keyboard, and palm rest graphics, similar to the left side.
attribute_screen_state: Screen is open and on, displaying a monochrome portrait graphic with a signature on a black background.
attribute_keyboard_layout: QWERTY layout with a function row, no numeric keypad visible, and multicolored backlighting.
attribute_sticker_placement: Two colorful graphic icons are present on the right palm rest area, one green and one red, with stylized designs.
